summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Configuration Integration (Phase A & B). Backend: 28/28 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Data Hub Configuration section working correctly after fix. All shared config APIs, RMS integration endpoints, and Data Hub integration endpoints verified.

integration_issues.issue: Hook was using process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL but Vite uses import.meta.env - FIXED

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/all - Full configuration (hotel, room_types, rate_plans, pricing_matrix, policies, taxes, settings)
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/room-types - Room types list
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/room-types?include_room_count=true - Room types with count
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/room-types/mapping - Code to data mapping
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/room-types/prices - Base prices
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/pricing-matrix - Full pricing matrix with BAR and NRF rates
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/rate-plans - All rate plans
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/rate-plans/base - Only base rates
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/hotel - Hotel profile
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/timezone - Hotel timezone
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/currency - Hotel currency
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/inventory - Inventory summary
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/rms-data - RMS specific data
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/datahub-data - Data Hub specific data
Backend: GET /api/rms/hotels/{hotel_id}/config-integration - RMS config from Configuration module
Backend: POST /api/rms/hotels/{hotel_id}/sync-from-config - Sync RMS with Configuration
Backend: GET /api/rms/hotels/{hotel_id}/room-types-from-config - Room types for RMS UI
Backend: GET /api/datahub/hotels/{hotel_id}/config-integration - Data Hub config from Configuration
Backend: GET /api/datahub/hotels/{hotel_id}/pricing-for-distribution - Pricing for OTA channels
Backend: GET /api/datahub/hotels/{hotel_id}/room-type-mapping/{ota_code} - OTA room type mapping
Backend: GET /api/datahub/hotels/{hotel_id}/rate-plan-mapping/{ota_code} - OTA rate plan mapping
Backend: Pricing matrix derivation - NRF is correctly -10% of BAR
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/policies/cancellation - Cancellation policies
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/policies/payment - Payment policies
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/policies/defaults - Default policies
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/taxes - Tax rules
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/settings - Advanced settings
Backend: GET /api/shared/config/{hotel_id}/calculate-price - Price with tax calculation
Frontend: Data Hub page loads with Configuration Data section
Frontend: Room types displayed (STD, SUP, DLX, STE) with prices
Frontend: Rate plans displayed (BAR, NRF) with Public/Private badges
Frontend: Settings displayed (Currency EUR, Timezone Europe/Paris, Check-in 15:00, Check-out 11:00)
critical_code_review_comments: ConfigService provides centralized access to all configuration data - well designed
Pricing matrix correctly calculates derived rates (NRF = BAR - 10%)
All APIs properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
RMS sync endpoint updates base_adr in rms_config collection correctly
seed_data_creation: Using existing test data: 4 room types (STD, SUP, DLX, STE), 2 rate plans (BAR, NRF with -10% derivation), 1 room
context_for_next_testing_agent: Configuration Integration (Phase A & B) fully tested. ConfigService at /app/backend/shared/config_service.py provides centralized access. Shared API at /api/shared/config/*. RMS integration at /api/rms/hotels/{id}/config-integration, sync-from-config, room-types-from-config. Data Hub integration at /api/datahub/hotels/{id}/config-integration, pricing-for-distribution, room-type-mapping/{ota}, rate-plan-mapping/{ota}. Frontend hook useConfigData.js fixed to use import.meta.env for Vite compatibility.

shared_config_api.inventory: GET /api/shared/config/{id}/inventory - Summary by type and floor
shared_config_api.rms_data: GET /api/shared/config/{id}/rms-data - RMS specific with overbooking settings
shared_config_api.datahub_data: GET /api/shared/config/{id}/datahub-data - Data Hub specific with check times

rms_integration.config_integration: GET /api/rms/hotels/{id}/config-integration - Full config from Configuration module

frontend.datahub_config_section: Data Hub Overview shows Configuration data with room types, rate plans, settings
